zh.lifeSummary: 當Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec於大約1288年出生時，他的父親Nikolaus Přemysl I.35歲，母親Adelaide Justina von Habsburg25歲。他於1338年3月25日與Duchess of Opawa - Hedwig在波蘭萊瓦福斯吉波維亞特 奧萊希尼次吉結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1365年12月8日享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec于大约1288年出生时，他的父亲Nikolaus Přemysl I.35岁，母亲Adelaide Justina von Habsburg25岁。他于1338年3月25日与Duchess of Opawa - Hedwig在波兰萊瓦福斯吉波維亞特 奧萊希尼次吉结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1365年12月8日享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mikuláš
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec was born about 1288, his father, Nikolaus Přemysl I., was 35 and his mother, Adelaide Justina von Habsburg, was 25. He married Duchess of Opawa - Hedwig on 25 March 1338, in Oleśnica, Wrocław, Poland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 8 December 1365, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec est né environ 1288, son père, Nikolaus Přemysl I., avait 35 ans et sa mère, Adelaide Justina von Habsburg, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Duchess of Opawa - Hedwig le 25 mars 1338, à Powiat oleśnicki, wrocławskie, Pologne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 8 décembre 1365, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec um 1288 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nikolaus Přemysl I. 35 und seine Mutter Adelaide Justina von Habsburg 25. Er hat am 25. März 1338 in Powiat oleśnicki, wrocławskie, Polen Duchess of Opawa - Hedwig geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 8. Dezember 1365 im Alter von 78 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec è nato il circa 1288, il suo padre, Nikolaus Přemysl I., aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide Justina von Habsburg, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Duchess of Opawa - Hedwig il 25 marzo 1338, nel Powiat oleśnicki, wrocławskie, Polonia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 8 dicembre 1365, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovecが約1288年に生まれた時，父Nikolaus Přemysl I.は35歳，母Adelaide Justina von Habsburgは25歳であった。1338年3月25日にポーランドウロクlアウスキポウィアト オレsニクイでDuchess of Opawa - Hedwigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1365年12月8日に78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec(이)가 대략 1288년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nikolaus Přemysl I.(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide Justina von Habsburg(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1338년 3월 25일 폴란드 록l아w스키 파위앳 레s닉키에서 Duchess of Opawa - Hedwig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1365년 12월 8일 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec nasceu aproximadamente 1288, seu pai, Nikolaus Přemysl I., tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide Justina von Habsburg, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Duchess of Opawa - Hedwig em 25 de março de 1338, em Powiat oleśnicki, wrocławskie, Polônia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 8 de dezembro de 1365, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec родился около 1288 г., его отцу по имени Nikolaus Přemysl I. было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide Justina von Habsburg, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Duchess of Opawa - Hedwig 25 марта 1338 г. в местности поуят олеsникки, рокlавски, Польша. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 8 декабря 1365 г. в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec nació aproximadamente 1288, su papá, Nikolaus Přemysl I., tenía 35 años y su mamá, Adelaide Justina von Habsburg, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Duchess of Opawa - Hedwig el 25 de marzo de 1338, en Powiat oleśnicki, wrocławskie, Polonia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 8 de diciembre de 1365, a la edad de 78 años.
